Meaning.En: A single number that represents the central or typical value in a set of numbers, typically calculated as the sum of the values divided by the number of values.
Meaning.Example: The average temperature in July this year was 2 degrees higher than last year.

Situation.Vi: Tính toán điểm trung bình học tập hoặc doanh thu hàng tháng.
Situation.En: Calculating students’ grade point average or monthly sales revenue.

Meaning.En: Typical or usual; not exceptional in any way.
Meaning.Example: She’s an average student—neither outstanding nor struggling.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả mức độ phổ biến hoặc khả năng tiêu chuẩn trong một nhóm.
Situation.En: Describing something that is typical or unremarkable within a group.

Meaning.Vi: trung bình hóa, đạt mức trung bình
Meaning.En: To calculate the average of a set of numbers; or to amount to an average over a period.
Meaning.Example: Her weekly coffee spending averages about $20.

Situation.Vi: Đánh giá mức độ tiêu chuẩn theo thời gian (ví dụ: doanh thu trung bình hàng tháng).
Situation.En: Evaluating long-term performance by computing a mean value over time (e.g., average monthly revenue).
